title: Apple's Leasing Program May Restrict iPhone Apps If You Miss Payments
summary: After a Bloomberg report earlier this week revealed that Apple could soon launch a leasing program for its devices, 9to5Mac has found references in iOS 27 code that suggest leased devices could be placed under strict limitations if payments are skipped.
caption: output/2026-07-23/apple-s-leasing-program-may-restrict-iphone-apps-if-you-miss-payments.txt
